emails.subject: Visit Summary - Kiwi - Dec 4, 2025
emails.content:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for bringing Kiwi in for her annual wellness exam. Here is a summary of the visit.

Patient: Kiwi
Species: Parakeet (Budgerigar)
Date of Visit: December 4, 2025
Doctor: Dr. Lisa Chen

Exam Findings:
- Weight: 32g (normal range)
- Feather condition: Healthy, no abnormal molting
- Beak and nails: Normal, no trimming needed
- Eyes, nares, ears: Clear
- Keel score: 3/5 (ideal)
- Heart and lungs: Normal
- Abdomen: Normal palpation
- Fecal gram stain: Normal flora

Assessment: Kiwi is a healthy 3-year-old parakeet in excellent condition. No concerns.

Recommendations:
- Continue current seed mix and fresh vegetables
- Next annual wellness exam in 12 months
- Contact us if you notice changes in appetite, droppings, or activity

A copy of the full report is attached.

Atlanta Avian & Exotic Vet
2145 Cheshire Bridge Rd NE, Suite 102
Atlanta, GA 30324
(404) 555-0519

emails.subject: Re: Visit Summary - Kiwi - Dec 4, 2025
emails.content:
Thanks! Glad she got a clean bill of health. See you next year!

Rachel

emails.subject: Maintenance Request - Apt 3B Kitchen Faucet
emails.content:
Hi,

The kitchen faucet in Apt 3B has been dripping for the last couple of days and it's gotten worse today. There's a steady drip even when the handle is fully off. I put a towel under it but it definitely needs someone to come take a look.

Thanks,
Rachel Wilson
Apt 3B

Unit: 3B

Status: Open

Flat Shoals Apartments Management

emails.subject: Re: Maintenance Request - Apt 3B Kitchen Faucet
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Thanks for reporting this. We've got a plumber scheduled to come out this Friday, January 23 between 1:00 PM and 3:00 PM. Someone will need to be home to let them in.

This is covered under your lease so there's no charge to you.

Let me know if that time works or if we need to reschedule.

Thanks,
Krystal Davis
Leasing Manager
Flat Shoals Apartments
(404) 555-0319

emails.content:

emails.subject: Tuition Rate Update - Effective March 1, 2026
emails.content:
Dear Little Acorns Families,

We are writing to let you know that monthly tuition will increase from $950 to $1,000 per month, effective March 1, 2026. This adjustment reflects increased staffing and supply costs.

Your March invoice will reflect the updated rate. Please contact our office at (404) 555-0291 with any questions.

Thank you for being part of the Little Acorns community.

Warm regards,
Little Acorns Preschool
1847 Glenwood Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
(404) 555-0291

emails.subject: Re: Tuition Rate Update - Effective March 1, 2026
emails.content:
Hi, thanks for the heads up. Will pickup times or hours change at all?

Rachel

emails.subject: Re: Tuition Rate Update - Effective March 1, 2026
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Nope, no changes to hours or pickup times. Everything else stays the same!

Best,
Ms. Davis
Little Acorns Admin

emails.subject: What to Know Before Saturday's Build
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Your build day is this Saturday! A few things to keep in mind:

CHECK IN
Arrive by 7:45 AM. Check in at the volunteer tent near the parking area.

PARKING
Street parking on Stanton Rd. Overflow lot at the church on the corner of Stanton and Langston.

WHAT TO WEAR
Dress for the weather and expect to get dirty. Long pants and closed-toe shoes are required. Layers are a good idea.

SAFETY ORIENTATION
All first-time volunteers will go through a 15-minute orientation before starting. Hard hats and safety glasses are provided.

WAIVER REMINDER
If you haven't completed your waiver yet, please do so before Saturday: habitatatlanta.org/waiver

See you there!

Habitat for Humanity Greater Atlanta
Volunteer Team

emails.subject: Thank You for Building with Us!
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Thank you for volunteering at the Stanton Meadows build site on Saturday! Your help made a real difference. The team framed three interior walls and completed exterior sheathing on Unit 7.

Your volunteer hours: 7.0 hours

Want to see photos from the day? Check them out here: habitatatlanta.org/photos/feb22

Our next build day is Saturday, March 15. Same site, same time. Sign up here if you'd like to come back: habitatatlanta.org/volunteer/march15

Thanks again for giving your Saturday to help a family get closer to home.

Habitat for Humanity Greater Atlanta
Volunteer Team

emails.subject: Lease Renewal Notice - Apt 3B, 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE
emails.content:
Dear Rachel Wilson,

Your current lease for Apt 3B at 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE expires April 30, 2026. We'd like to offer you a 12-month renewal.

Renewal Details:
Unit: Apt 3B, 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
New Term: May 1, 2026 through April 30, 2027
Monthly Rent: $1,600.00 (current rate: $1,550.00)
Security Deposit: No change
Parking: Included (Spot B-12)

To renew, reply to this email or stop by the leasing office. We will send a DocuSign link for the renewal agreement once you confirm.

Deadline to renew: April 30, 2026

If you choose not to renew, please provide 30 days written notice prior to your lease end date.

We hope you'll stay! Let us know if you have any questions.

Krystal Davis
Leasing Manager
Flat Shoals Apartments
742 Flat Shoals Ave SE, Atlanta, GA 30316
(404) 555-0319
Office Hours: Mon-Fri 9 AM - 5 PM, Sat 10 AM - 2 PM

emails.subject: Re: Lease Renewal Notice - Apt 3B, 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE
emails.content:
Hi Krystal,

Thanks for sending this over. Is there any flexibility on the rate? I've been here almost two years with no issues. Also is there a longer term option that might keep the rent closer to what I'm paying now?

Thanks,
Rachel

emails.subject: Re: Lease Renewal Notice - Apt 3B, 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Thanks for asking! Unfortunately the $1,600 rate is the standard renewal rate across all one-bedroom units this year. We aren't offering multi-year terms this cycle.

I know that's not the answer you were hoping for, but we really do value you as a tenant. If you'd like to go ahead with the renewal just let me know and I'll get the DocuSign over to you.

Thanks,
Krystal Davis
Leasing Manager
Flat Shoals Apartments
(404) 555-0319

emails.subject: Re: Lease Renewal Notice - Apt 3B, 742 Flat Shoals Ave SE
emails.content:
Ok, I'll go ahead and renew. Please send the DocuSign whenever.

Rachel

emails.subject: Front-End Developer Opportunity at Mosaic Digital
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

I came across your profile on LinkedIn and I think you'd be a great fit for a Front-End Developer position we're hiring for at Mosaic Digital.

We're a digital agency in Midtown Atlanta, about 80 people, and our dev team works on React and Next.js projects for retail and hospitality brands. The role is hybrid (3 days in-office, 2 remote) and the range is $75-95K depending on experience.

Would you be open to a quick call to learn more? I'd love to tell you about the team and what we're working on.

Sarah Chen
Talent Acquisition
Mosaic Digital
(404) 555-0831

emails.subject: Re: Front-End Developer Opportunity at Mosaic Digital
emails.content:
Hi Sarah,

Thanks for reaching out. I've been doing front-end work for about two years and have been spending a lot of time with React lately, so this sounds really interesting.

I'd love to learn more about the role and the team. I'm pretty flexible on timing for a call.

Rachel
